question_text: Which statement best describes the particle model of matter?

options.label: A
options.text: All matter is made of tiny particles that are always moving and have spaces between them

options.label: B
options.text: All matter is solid and particles are packed tightly with no movement

options.label: C
options.text: Particles only exist in liquids and gases, not in solids

options.label: D
options.text: The particle model only applies to metals and not to other materials

explanation: The particle model states that all matter consists of tiny particles in constant random motion with spaces between them. This applies to all three states of matter: solids, liquids, and gases.
